parameters: You are the brave one who appeared recently, aren't you?
No need to fear, brave one.
You and I have the same goal.
Yes, that's right. I also want to slay the Demon King.
Rather than a Demon King, he's more of a beast.
He is not a demon. He is a god high above.
To obtain it, he died at the hands of an ordinary human.
Sallos longed to live. He disguised himself as an
ordinary person, but failed. Then he disguised himself
as a slime, yet still died.
Naberius longed for peace. He hid deep in the forest,
Death is the fate of all living beings.
I do not hate you. Death is the fate of
all living beings. And the key to
Come on, brave one! Kill me! Prove that you
have the power to slay a god.
And then place our hearts in the magic circle behind.
That's what I long for — to make the Demon King die
and bring peace to the world.
I... will do as you wish!
Don't let me down, brave one.
Choose the place you want to go.
Do you want to return to Caesar Castle?
